layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing for data visibility. 'Control Room' protocol.

component_guidelines.buttons: Solid brand color for primary, flat borders for secondary. Sharp corners (rounded-md). Always define hover states (darker brand or slate-100 for secondary).
component_guidelines.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), minimal shadow. No glassmorphism. 'Technical/Grid' look.
component_guidelines.tables: High density, cardless or bordered-collapse styling. Sticky headers. Tabular-nums for financial data. Functional color coding only (red for overdue, green for cleared). Include explicit data-testid attributes for rows and actions.
component_guidelines.navigation: Sidebar with secondary background (#F8FAFC). High contrast active state (Brand blue text and left border indicator). Topbar for global search and profile.
component_guidelines.charts: Recharts or Shadcn charts. Interactive tooltips. Max 3-5 variables per chart to prevent clutter. Keep colors functional.
component_guidelines.modals_dialogs: Use Shadcn Dialog. Strict max-width (max-w-2xl for complex forms). Backdrop blur sm with dark overlay.
component_guidelines.empty_states: Minimalist. Muted icon + simple text + primary CTA if applicable.
component_guidelines.forms: Use Shadcn form components. Group inputs logically. Use structured grids for dense forms.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Required on all interactive elements. Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-[1px]) with shadow-sm transition.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Fast and crisp. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interaction.loading: Skeleton loaders for data tables. No full-page spinners if possible.

login_background.description: Abstract modern corporate architecture background for authentication screens
login_background.usage: Use as a full-bleed side image on the login/signup page.

user_profile.usage: Use in the topbar profile dropdown, settings, or client portal contacts.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Pay attention to status badges.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Chivo' (headings) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (body) are imported via Google Fonts.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid philosophy (grid-cols-4, dense).
Implement the 'North Star' metric pattern for Cash Balance in the top-left of the Dashboard.
Use Shadcn UI extensively but override default border-radius to `rounded-md` and shadow to `shadow-sm` for a tighter, more professional look.
Implement responsive data tables with tabular-nums for all financial figures.
Use explicitly defined hover states and transition classes.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL buttons, inputs, tabs, and table rows. E.g., data-testid='save-company-btn'.
Do not use placeholder text for any images. Use the URLs provided in the images section.
